# Ayush Agarwal | Systems & Agent Engineer

High-performance AI agent architectures, e-commerce SaaS engines, and interactive web platforms.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://theayush.pages.dev/
- Email: theayush.codes@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/theayushagarwal
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ayushagarwal17

## Technical Profile
Specializes in production-grade LLM state machines, secure database schemas, high-velocity backend pipelines, and glassmorphic user interfaces.

### Core Stack
- **AI & Automation**: LangGraph, Gemini API, Groq, Cerebras, Playwright, Jinja2, GitHub Actions.
- **Backend & DB**: Python, Go, FastAPI, SQLite, Supabase, Firebase Admin SDK.
- **Frontend & Systems**: TypeScript, React 19, TanStack Start / Router, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
- **Availability**: Actively seeking global remote software engineering roles, high-velocity contracts, and freelance projects (Starting VIT CSE in August 2026).

---

## Key Projects

### Vurlo (Full-Stack E-commerce SaaS)
- **URL**: https://theayush.pages.dev/projects/vurlo
- **Role**: Founder & Lead Architect
- **Build Time**: 10 Days
- **Key Metrics**: 100/100 Lighthouse SEO, 0 inventory oversells, under 400ms loading latency.
- **Architecture**: Atomic inventory check-and-decrement transactions in Firestore preventing race conditions. Multi-point rollback handlers for aborted payment SDK exits. Server-side payment verification via HMAC-SHA256. Resend mail queues and Gemini recommendation slots.

### Veltrix (Autonomous Social Engine)
- **URL**: https://theayush.pages.dev/projects/veltrix
- **Role**: Solo Developer
- **Cadence**: 2 automated posts/day
- **Operational Cost**: ~$0.0002 per post
- **Architecture**: Multimodel adversarial loop. Gemini 2.0 Flash drafts captions; Groq (Llama) and Cerebras act as independent auditors. Posts are committed only if both auditors agree. Renders carousels and images via Jinja2 templates into headless Playwright browsers at native DPI resolutions.

### Vcentre (Competitor Intelligence Scraper)
- **URL**: https://theayush.pages.dev/projects/vcentre
- **Role**: Solo Developer
- **Cadence**: Daily @ 2:00 AM UTC
- **Stack**: Python, Apify, FastAPI, SQLite
- **Architecture**: Nightly scraping of target competitor channels. Separates Reels and Photos into cohort-specific baselines to prevent viral inflation. Filters outliers using a 3x-median engagement check, runs findings through a 10-provider LLM fallback chain, and generates production creative briefs.
